title: DSC106 Project 2: Deceptive Visualizations
description: Conducted Exploratory Data Analysis to create visualizations that intentionally mislead viewers about the true trends in a dataset, demonstrating the importance of ethical data representation.

title: Portfolio Site Development
description: Built a responsive personal portfolio using modern JavaScript, CSS grid, and dynamic data fetching from the GitHub API.

title: DSC106 Project 1: Food Processing Visualization
description: Designed a captivating visualization that ranks retail food items based on their level of processing and nutritional value.

title: Power Outage Analysis
description: Investigated geographic and seasonal patterns in major U.S. power outages to determine the most significant causes of disruption.

title: Customer Segmentation via K-Means
description: Applied unsupervised learning to categorize e-commerce customers into distinct personas based on purchasing frequency and total spend.

title: Predictive Modeling for Sales
description: Built a multi-linear regression model to forecast quarterly sales figures based on historical performance and market indicators.

title: Sentiment Analysis on Social Media
description: Utilized natural language processing (NLP) to classify public sentiment on trending technology topics using the Twitter API.

title: Educational Tech Kit Design
description: Developed a modular hardware kit intended to teach elementary school students the basics of electronic circuits and sustainable design.

title: Image Compression via PCA
description: Implemented Principal Component Analysis to reduce image file sizes while preserving essential visual features and variance.

title: Neural Network for Digit Recognition
description: Trained a convolutional neural network on the MNIST dataset to achieve high accuracy in handwritten digit identification.

title: Autonomous Pathfinding Algorithm
description: Simulated an A* search algorithm for an autonomous robot navigating through a dynamic maze with moving obstacles.

title: Database Schema Optimization
description: Redesigned a relational database for a mock library system to reduce query latency and ensure data integrity compliance.
